_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: FiveM Game Egg
author: santosmodsdev@gmail.com
description: The SantosMods.dev FiveM Egg (FORK OF parker@parkervcp.com)
startup: $(pwd)/alpine/opt/cfx-server/ld-musl-x86_64.so.1 --library-path "$(pwd)/alpine/usr/lib/v8/:$(pwd)/alpine/lib/:$(pwd)/alpine/usr/lib/" -- $(pwd)/alpine/opt/cfx-server/FXServer +set citizen_dir $(pwd)/alpine/opt/cfx-server/citizen/ +set sv_licenseKey {{FIVEM_LICENSE}} +set steam_webApiKey {{STEAM_WEBAPIKEY}} +set sv_maxplayers {{MAX_PLAYERS}} $( [ "{{TXADMIN_ENABLE}}" = "1" ] || printf '%s' '+exec server.cfg' )

installation.script:
set -euo pipefail

apt update -y
apt install -y tar xz-utils file jq unzip git curl

SERVER_DIR="/mnt/server"
TMP_DIR="/tmp/cfx-server-data"
ARTIFACT_FILE="fivem-artifact"

mkdir -p "${SERVER_DIR}/resources"
cd "${SERVER_DIR}"

echo "[SantosMods] Updating CitizenFX base resources"

rm -rf "${TMP_DIR}"
git clone https://github.com/citizenfx/cfx-server-data.git "${TMP_DIR}"
cp -Rf "${TMP_DIR}/resources/"* resources/
rm -rf "${TMP_DIR}"

RELEASE_PAGE=$(curl -fsSL https://runtime.fivem.net/artifacts/fivem/build_proot_linux/master/)
CHANGELOGS_PAGE=$(curl -fsSL https://changelogs-live.fivem.net/api/changelog/versions/linux/server)

if [[ "${FIVEM_VERSION:-recommended}" == "recommended" ]]; then
  DOWNLOAD_LINK=$(echo "${CHANGELOGS_PAGE}" | jq -r '.recommended_download')
elif [[ "${FIVEM_VERSION}" == "latest" ]]; then
  DOWNLOAD_LINK=$(echo "${CHANGELOGS_PAGE}" | jq -r '.latest_download')
else
  VERSION_LINK=$(echo "${RELEASE_PAGE}" \
    | grep -Eo '".*/*.tar.xz"' \
    | tr -d '"' \
    | sed 's|\./||' \
    | grep -i "${FIVEM_VERSION}" \
    | head -n1)

  if [[ -z "${VERSION_LINK}" ]]; then
    echo "[SantosMods] Invalid version requested. Falling back to recommended."
    DOWNLOAD_LINK=$(echo "${CHANGELOGS_PAGE}" | jq -r '.recommended_download')
  else
    DOWNLOAD_LINK="https://runtime.fivem.net/artifacts/fivem/build_proot_linux/master/${VERSION_LINK}"
  fi
fi

if [[ -z "${DOWNLOAD_LINK}" || "${DOWNLOAD_LINK}" == "null" ]]; then
  echo "[SantosMods] Failed to resolve FiveM download link"
  exit 2
fi

if [[ -n "${DOWNLOAD_URL:-}" ]]; then
  if curl --head --silent --fail "${DOWNLOAD_URL}" >/dev/null; then
    echo "[SantosMods] Custom download URL validated"
    DOWNLOAD_LINK="${DOWNLOAD_URL}"
  else
    echo "[SantosMods] Invalid custom download URL. Aborting."
    exit 2
  fi
fi

echo "[SantosMods] Downloading FiveM artifact"

curl -fL "${DOWNLOAD_LINK}" -o "${ARTIFACT_FILE}"

echo "[SantosMods] Extracting FiveM files"

FILETYPE=$(file -b "${ARTIFACT_FILE}")

if echo "${FILETYPE}" | grep -qi gzip; then
  tar xzf "${ARTIFACT_FILE}"
elif echo "${FILETYPE}" | grep -qi zip; then
  unzip -o "${ARTIFACT_FILE}"
elif echo "${FILETYPE}" | grep -qi xz; then
  tar xf "${ARTIFACT_FILE}"
else
  echo "[SantosMods] Unsupported archive format: ${FILETYPE}"
  exit 2
fi

rm -f "${ARTIFACT_FILE}"

if [[ -f server.cfg ]]; then
  echo "[SantosMods] Existing server.cfg detected. Skipping."
else
  echo "[SantosMods] Downloading default server.cfg"
  curl -fsSL \
    https://raw.githubusercontent.com/parkervcp/eggs/master/game_eggs/gta/fivem/server.cfg \
    -o server.cfg
fi

mkdir -p logs/

echo "[SantosMods] FiveM installation complete"

variables.name: fivem license
variables.description:
Required to start the server.
Get it from https://portal.cfx.re/

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Sets the maximum number of concurrent FiveM players.

variables.name: Server Hostname
variables.description: Name shown in the FiveM server browser.

variables.name: fivem version
variables.description:
Build version to install.
Invalid values fall back to the recommended build.

variables.name: Download Link
variables.description:
Artifact URL used only by the install script.
Must point to an fx.tar.xz file.

variables.name: Steam Web Api Key
variables.description:
Your Steam API key or set to none.
Get it from https://steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey/

variables.name: txAdmin Port
variables.description: Port used by the txAdmin web panel.

variables.name: Enable txadmin
variables.description:
Enable txAdmin
Set to 1 to enable.
Set to 0 to disable.
